name: certifychain
description: CertifyChain – Academic Certificate Verification Platform on Stellar/Soroban

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared && npm run build --workspace=apps/api && npm run build --workspace=apps/web
scripts.build:web: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared && npm run build --workspace=apps/web
scripts.build:api: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared && npm run build --workspace=apps/api
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=apps/web && npm run lint --workspace=apps/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace=apps/web && npm run typecheck --workspace=apps/api && npm run typecheck --workspace=packages/shared
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=apps/web && npm run test --workspace=apps/api
